chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-602 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 02.05.2023 Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, APG along with PI Muhammad Changal on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, IO/ASI Habibullah Kalwar and SIP Mujahid Hussain Mangi on behalf of SHO PS Market. ----- Mr. Masood Rasool Babar Memon advocate has filed power on behalf of respondent No.7 who is also present in person. Petitioner No.1 present submits that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice. She has reiterated same facts before the IO who has recorded her statement and submitted a copy thereof. However, counsel for the complainant, who is her father, has submitted the documents including Birth Certificate issued by NADRA which shows that she is underage. In view of such position, the IO submits that as far as abduction of petitioner No.1 is concerned, it is not made out from her statement but as there are documents showing that she is underage, he would properly investigate the matter and submit the Challan under relevant provisions of Sindh Child Marriage Restraint, Rules 2013. Be that as it may, the IO shall not effect arrest in the said FIR tillsubmission of the Challan before the trial court. This petition in the terms as above is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
